```python
import sys

def solve():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    A = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check all permutations of the three elements
    if (A[0] * A[1] == A[2] or
        A[0] * A[2] == A[1] or
        A[1] * A[2] == A[0]):
        print("Yes")
    else:
        print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
